author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in f8923912. Root cause: the audit log showed close_issue actions succeeding end-to-end (CLI exited 0, hub issues 170 + 171 confirmed closed). What the user saw as a 'no-op' was purely frontend-visibility — useProjectMutations never invalidated ['dashboard','alerts'], so the alert stayed on-screen until the 5s polling fallback fired. Three fixes:

1. useProjectMutations now invalidates the alerts query alongside projects + project-detail. Every write-surface mutation refreshes the alerts list immediately.

2. AlertActions shows a role=status aria-live banner after a successful mutation with the kind-specific message + 'alert clears on the next poll tick' setting honest expectations.

3. Comment textarea ungated from kind==='overdue_issue' — now renders for any issue-subject (orphan_subissue too). Previously the Comment button was a dead stub on orphan_subissue.

17/17 Alerts tests pass (added 3); full frontend suite 98/98.
